The funding application form requires upload of bank statements for each account showing the last 30 days of transactions.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Bank Statement Locator Report

**Task:** locate-bank-stmts-NAP-SRC-0008
**Applicant:** Anfal Elbushra
**Source Reviewed:** NAP-SRC-0008 (Living Cost Questions - Trimester 2)

## Findings

1. The applicant listed a Monzo bank account with a balance of £0.38.
2. The funding application form explicitly requires upload of bank statements for each account showing the last 30 days of transactions.
3. No bank statements were found in the provided source materials.

## Recommendation

A follow-up task is proposed to request the bank statements from the applicant or the university's hardship/welfare office. The statements are necessary to verify the applicant's financial circumstances and to complete the funding application assessment.
proposed_artifacts.title: Bank Statement Locator Report for NAP-SRC-0008

proposed_tasks.instructions: Request bank statements for the Monzo account held by Anfal Elbushra, covering the last 30 days of transactions. The statements are required to complete the funding application assessment in source NAP-SRC-0008. Contact the applicant or the university's hardship/welfare office to obtain the statements. Upload the statements as new source materials with source_type 'hardship-and-welfare'.
proposed_tasks.title: Request bank statements for applicant Anfal Elbushra

risk_flags.description: Missing bank statements may result in incomplete assessment of the applicant's financial circumstances for hardship funding.

summary: Reviewed source NAP-SRC-0008 (Living Cost Questions - Trimester 2) for applicant Anfal Elbushra. The form requires bank statements for each account held, and the applicant listed a Monzo account with a balance of £0.38. No bank statements were found in the provided source materials. The task to locate and upload bank statements cannot be completed from the available evidence; a follow-up task is proposed to request the statements from the applicant or the university.

uncertainties.description: Whether bank statements for the Monzo account were ever submitted by the applicant or are held elsewhere in the matter records.
Whether the applicant holds any other bank accounts beyond the Monzo account listed.
